titleStmt.title: SII 9.116: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 116. (A.R. No. 489 of 1915.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR THE CATTLE-TROUGH AT BADANEHALU, ADONI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 976, Jaya, Phālguṇa, śu. 5, Ādityavāra corresponding to A.D. 1055 February 4 Saturday, not Sunday, and refers itself to the reign of the Chālukya king Trailōkyamalladēva. It records that when Vīra-Noḷamba-Pallava-Permānaḍi was ruling over Sindavāḍi-thousand, Pergaḍe Vīrarakshasa under the orders of • • Rāya caused the construction of a well in Nēṟila-Badalapāḷu in Kavutāḷu twelve. A gift of 12 mattars of land was made for it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśra
yaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ ma
hārājādhirāja paramēsvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayaku
ḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatrai
ḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivirddhipravardhamānamācaṁdrārkatāraṁ
baraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa sa
madhigatapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ pallavānvayaṁ śrī
pṛthvīvallabhaṁ pallavakuḷatiḷaka(ṁ)nēkavākyaṁ kāṁcī
puravarēsvaraṁ śrīmadvīranoḷaṁbapallavapermā
naḍigaḷ siṁdavāḍi sāyiramumaṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁdāḷuttamire sakhavarṣa 976 neya jayasaṁvatsara
phālguṇa suddha 5 Ādityavāradaṁdu perggaḍe vīrarākṣasa
hirāyana binnapadiṁ kavatāḷu panneraḍaṟa baḷiya nēṟi
la badalapāḷa dharmmitada bāvivaradakkaṁ biṭṭa kariya ne
la mattu 13 Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisuvar tappidavargge bā
ṇarāsiyalu kavileyanaḷida dōṣaṁ sārggu . sāmānyōyaṁ dha
rmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvānētāṁ
bhāgina pārttivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasundharī . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasaha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
